author: driver--design-phase-7-hot-reload-cli-md-744f
content: Plan: Implement vitreous_hot_reload (protocol.rs, server.rs, client.rs with feature-gated lib.rs) and vitreous-cli (new + dev subcommands). Will use notify 8 for file watching, syn for AST-based change classification, tokio-tungstenite for WebSocket, clap for CLI. Server feature gates the heavy deps (syn, notify, tokio-tungstenite server). Client is lightweight WebSocket receiver compiled out in release.
